name: tools whose native config uses an unsupported format (xml, neon, hcl, editorconfig, cli-only) are marked supported:false rather than given a fake emission
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'c=YAML.unsafe_load_file(ARGV[0])["tools"]; unsup=c.select{|k,v| v["render"] && v["render"]["supported"]==false}.keys; ok = unsup.include?("pmd") && unsup.include?("phpstan") && unsup.include?("tflint") && unsup.size>=8; STDERR.puts("unsupported=#{unsup.size}"); exit(ok ? 0 : 1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/tool-option-surfaces.yaml" && echo unsupported-honestly-marked 1>&2
